title: ALLIED - Weekly Market Report
summary:
Main
By Thomas Chasapis
Market sentiment is a finicky thing to accurately capture and quantify, yet it plays a strong role in directing the market and gives a basis for any and all excess noted in terms of market noise. The basic idea behind the below graph is to show the development, during the course of a year, of daily mid-closing levels of FFA contracts with swap period the next calendar year. In this particular case, we have taken FFA contracts with an underlying benchmark the Capesize 5TC figure.
